consequences: Proposal is created for governance review
No accepted ADR is created directly by MCP
context: Smoke test confirming ADR proposal submission through governed MCP capability execution.
decision: ADR proposals may originate from MCP but do not directly accept or mutate ADR records.
future_considerations: ArchitectWorker may later convert approved proposals into accepted ADRs
rationale: This validates the 18.6 governance boundary from external proposal to internal approval path.
title: MCP ADR smoke proposal
tradeoffs: Adds a proposal step but preserves Chair authority
